content: We can reframe language learning vocabulary acquisition as an iterative LLM-style self-refinement process, where students use the metacognitive reflexion skill they practice in English writing workshops to dynamically correct and refine their own understanding of new vocabulary like 'reflexion' itself, just as an autonomous AI Reflexion agent iteratively improves its outputs via Self-Refine's self-feedback loop. This framework turns passive vocabulary memorization into an active, self-guided refinement process that mirrors cutting-edge AI architecture.
